query:
INSERT INTO softwareVersions (version, displayName, description, releaseNotes, downloadUrl, fileSize, isLatest, releaseDate) VALUES
('2025.3.0', 'Reblium Studio 2025.3.0', 'Latest stable release with avatar customization and store features', 'Major improvements to avatar system, new store categories, artist profiles, and software update feature. Bug fixes and performance optimizations.', 'https://example.com/reblium-2025.3.0.exe', 524288000, true, '2025-12-03'),
('2025.3.0-beta.2', 'Reblium Studio 2025.3.0 Beta 2', 'Beta build with new features and improvements', 'Beta 2: Fixed avatar rendering issues, improved store performance, added new hair styles, enhanced artist profiles. Known issues: some animations may stutter on older systems.', 'https://example.com/reblium-2025.3.0-beta.2.exe', 512000000, false, '2025-11-28'),
('2025.2.5', 'Reblium Studio 2025.2.5', 'Previous stable release', 'Stability improvements, bug fixes for avatar export, improved credit system, performance optimizations for large projects.', 'https://example.com/reblium-2025.2.5.exe', 498688000, false, '2025-10-15'),
('2025.4.0-beta.1', 'Reblium Studio 2025.4.0 Beta 1', 'Early access to upcoming features', 'Beta 1: Experimental avatar animation system, new accessories category, improved UI responsiveness, real-time collaboration features (experimental). This is an early beta - expect bugs and breaking changes.', 'https://example.com/reblium-2025.4.0-beta.1.exe', 536870912, false, '2025-12-01');
